text: ; After running through ‘opt -p mem2reg‘ define i32 @pow(i32 %x, 132 %y) { start: br label %loop_start Tloop_start: e F/5 SO TE o] o M R 00 IO TR 13 o= o I 75 O T\ VAR P R 1T o Donupanon %r.0 = phi i32 [1, %start], [%r.new, %loop] Frontier %done = icmp eq i32 %i.0, %y lock br il %done, label %exit, label %loop Tloop: %r.new = mul 132 %r.0, %x As %loop is dominated b5 B (TR Ve o I R 5 R C IR by %loop_start br label %loop_start exdit: ret i32 %r.0 3
